steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The parallel verb in the same sentence: “set my guitar case against a wall.” This word shows exactly what “drop” means in context.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The target meaning is to place something down. “Drop” and “set” are parallel actions describing how the narrator puts down his belongings upon arrival.

Choice B, “Put down,” directly expresses this literal meaning.

The other choices describe entirely different actions—forgetting, unbolting, or emptying—and don't fit the context of placing objects down.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
